mapper.select: SELECT * FROM drone ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM drone WHERE name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%' OR model LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%' ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drone (model, name, manufacturer, weight, max_speed, max_altitude, flight_range, max_flight_time, propulsion_system, control_system, communication_protocol, status, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{model}, #{name}, #{manufacturer}, #{weight}, #{maxSpeed}, #{maxAltitude}, #{flightRange}, #{maxFlightTime}, #{propulsionSystem}, #{controlSystem}, #{communicationProtocol}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createTime,typeHandler=com.cupro.drone.handler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{updateTime,typeHandler=com.cupro.drone.handler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE drone SET model = #{model}, name = #{name}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, weight = #{weight}, max_speed = #{maxSpeed}, max_altitude = #{maxAltitude}, flight_range = #{flightRange}, max_flight_time = #{maxFlightTime}, propulsion_system = #{propulsionSystem}, control_system = #{controlSystem}, communication_protocol = #{communicationProtocol}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, update_time = #{updateTime,typeHandler=com.cupro.drone.handler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
